parameters.jsCode: const NL=String.fromCharCode(10);const p=$input.first().json;const{customerEmail,customerName,paymentType,sessions,sessionsRemaining,validThrough}=p;const firstName=customerName.split(' ')[0];const sessionList=sessions.map(s=>'· '+s.label).join(NL);let balanceLine='';if(sessionsRemaining===null&&validThrough){const d=new Date(validThrough+'T12:00:00Z').toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'long',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});balanceLine='Unlimited sessions — active through '+d+'.';}else if(sessionsRemaining!==null){balanceLine=sessionsRemaining+' session'+(sessionsRemaining!==1?'s':'')+' remaining on your package.';}const count=sessions.length;const countStr=count+' session'+(count!==1?'s':'');let emailPrompt;if(paymentType==='individual'){emailPrompt='Write a booking confirmation email for '+firstName+', who just paid for '+countStr+' at Blocksmiths. Follow this template closely:'+NL+NL+firstName+','+NL+NL+'Payment confirmed. Sessions locked in:'+NL+NL+sessionList+NL+NL+'Location: Traverse Park, Fort Collins, CO. Show up early. Wear cleats. Bring water.'+NL+NL+'coachcooper@mytrenches.com'+NL+NL+'Return only the email body. No subject line. No explanation. No additions.';}else{const bp=balanceLine?NL+NL+balanceLine:'';emailPrompt='Write a booking confirmation email for '+firstName+', who just booked '+countStr+' using their Blocksmiths package. Follow this template closely:'+NL+NL+firstName+','+NL+NL+'Sessions confirmed:'+NL+NL+sessionList+bp+NL+NL+'Location: Traverse Park, Fort Collins, CO. Show up early. Wear cleats. Bring water. Book more sessions: blocksmiths.mytrenches.com/book'+NL+NL+'coachcooper@mytrenches.com'+NL+NL+'Return only the email body. No subject line. No explanation. No additions.';}const claudeBody={model:'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',max_tokens:400,system:'You are Coach Eric Cooper, founder of Blocksmiths, a youth football training company specializing in offensive and defensive line development. Write like a coach: direct, confident, no wasted words. Never use: I wanted to reach out, I hope this finds you well, excited to, thrilled, journey, empower, looking forward to working with you, do not hesitate to reach out, please feel free, or anything that sounds like a marketing template. No motivational filler. Every sentence does a job.',messages:[{role:'user',content:emailPrompt}]};return[{json:{customerEmail,firstName,firstSessionLabel:sessions[0]?sessions[0].label:'your upcoming session',claudeBody:JSON.stringify(claudeBody)}}];
